route._orientation_doc: Research 2026-07-20: High Plains Raceway runs CLOCKWISE (PCA turn guide + LapMeta, 15 turns, 2.56 mi). Our ring is already CW. REAL S/F: mid front straight (~370 m, WSW->ENE ~102 deg, between the Prairie Corkscrew exit and T1) at real-world ~39.7350,-103.8946 — but THIS trace lives in a displaced frame (~77 km off; re-source pending per CLAUDE.md), so start_at is the matching straight IN THE TRACE'S OWN FRAME: the 207 m straight bearing 115.7 deg, midpoint 39.67456,-104.77141. Re-derive when re-sourced. Pit lane: real hot pits on the NORTH side of the front straight (driver's left), ~690 m incl. entry/exit; entry before S/F at the corkscrew exit, exit wraps outside T1-T2 and merges at T2 exit.
